index.html.title: IKE Network
index.html.keywords: IKE,integrated knowledge exchange,sociotechnical fabric,knowledge infrastructure,IKE Network,Maven Central,ike-base-parent,ike-tooling,ike-docs,ike-platform,ike-example-ws,example-project,doc-example
index.html.body: IKE Network The IKE Network (Integrated Knowledge Exchange) is a sociotechnical fabric where knowledge compounds. Foundation The IKE foundation — published to Maven Central and inheritable by any project. Each layer builds on the one above it. IKE Base Parent [1] Tier 0 foundation parent for the IKE Network — the apex of the parent inheritance forest, inherited by ike-tooling, ike-docs, and ike-platform. Carries shared publishing metadata, GPG signing, and Maven Central publishing configuration. Version 3 Site ike.network/ike-base-parent[2] GitHub IKE-Network/ike-base-parent[3] IKE Tooling [4] Workspace management, release orchestration, gitflow workflows, and build-time utilities for IKE Network projects. Version 190 Site ike.network/ike-tooling[5] GitHub IKE-Network/ike-tooling[6] Modules ike-build-standards ike-java-support ike-workspace-model ike-maven-plugin-support ike-maven-plugin IKE Docs [7] Documentation plumbing for the IKE Network. Hosts the ike-doc-maven-plugin (ike-doc packaging, AsciiDoc/render pipeline, PDF dispatch), the Koncept AsciiDoc extension, DocBook XSL + fonts, shared doc resources, and the semantic linebreak reformatter. Split from ike-pipeline to resolve the extensions=true reactor-load cycle. See IKE-Network/ike-issues#216. Version 47 Site ike.network/ike-docs[8] GitHub IKE-Network/ike-docs[9] Modules ike-doc-resources minimal-fonts docbook-xsl koncept-asciidoc-extension ike-doc-maven-plugin semantic-linebreak IKE Workspace Extension [10] Maven 4 build extension that prunes non-existent <subprojects> entries from workspace POMs before model validation. Lets a fresh clone of an IKE workspace bootstrap with mvn ws:scaffold-init before any subproject directory is on disk. Version 2 Site ike.network/ike-workspace-extension[11] GitHub IKE-Network/ike-workspace-extension[12] IKE Platform [13] Consumer-facing parent POM, BOM, and workspace management plugin for the IKE Network. External doc and code projects inherit from ike-parent (declared here); cross-repo workspace operations use ike-workspace-maven-plugin (ws:* goals). Consumes ike-docs as an external artifact — ike-parent declares ike-doc-maven-plugin with extensions=true, resolving from Nexus at project-load time. Split from the archived ike-pipeline; see IKE-Network/ike-issues#216. Version 77 Site ike.network/ike-platform[14] GitHub IKE-Network/ike-platform[15] Modules ike-parent ike-workspace-maven-plugin ike-bom Examples Reference projects that show how to consume the IKE foundation. They are deliberately not published to Maven Central: they are worked examples to read and copy, not libraries to depend on. Publishing them as artifacts would invite accidental coupling to code that exists only to illustrate a pattern. IKE Documentation Example Documentation-only project demonstrating the IKE AsciiDoc pipeline. Exercises all diagram types, Koncept macros, typography, and layout features across all 6 PDF renderers. Version 31 Site ike.network/doc-example[16] GitHub IKE-Network/doc-example[17] IKE Example Project Example Java project demonstrating IKE documentation pipeline integration with Java source, tests, and Koncept macros. Version 31 Site ike.network/example-project[18] GitHub IKE-Network/example-project[19] IKE Example Integration Test Harness End-to-end smoke tests that exercise the IKE Network release cascade as external consumers would. Each IT case clones the intended usage pattern (doc-only project, java + docs, BOM import, ws:create scaffold) in a fresh Maven environment and asserts that the build succeeds and produces the expected artifacts. Version 23 Site ike.network/ike-example-its[20] GitHub IKE-Network/ike-example-its[21] IKE Example Workspace Version 22 Site ike.network/ike-example-ws[22] GitHub IKE-Network/ike-example-ws[23] Modules doc-example example-project its

dependency-info.html.title: Maven Coordinates
dependency-info.html.keywords: IKE,integrated knowledge exchange,sociotechnical fabric,knowledge infrastructure,IKE Network,Maven Central,ike-base-parent,ike-tooling,ike-docs,ike-platform,ike-example-ws,example-project,doc-example
dependency-info.html.body:
Maven Coordinates Apache Maven <dependency>
  <groupId>network.ike</groupId>
  <artifactId>ike-network-site</artifactId>
  <version>2</version>
  <type>pom</type>
</dependency> Apache Ivy <dependency org="network.ike" name="ike-network-site" rev="2">
  <artifact name="ike-network-site" type="pom" />
</dependency> Groovy Grape @Grapes(
@Grab(group='network.ike', module='ike-network-site', version='2')
) Gradle/Grails implementation 'network.ike:ike-network-site:2' Scala SBT libraryDependencies += "network.ike" % "ike-network-site" % "2" Leiningen [network.ike/ike-network-site "2"]

project-info.html.body: Project Information This document provides an overview of the various documents and links that are part of this project's general information. All of this content is automatically generated by Maven[1] on behalf of the project. Overview Document Description Maven Coordinates[2] This document describes how to include this project as a dependency using various dependency management tools. Distribution Management[3] This document provides informations on the distribution management of this project. About[4] Organization landing page for IKE Network projects. Licenses[5] This document lists the project license(s). Plugins[6] This document lists the build plugins and the report plugins used by this project. Summary[7] This document lists other related information of this project
